ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import nowUtc from modules::datetime::utils --- { dateTime: nowUtc(), httpStatus: 200, status: "SUCCESS", message: "Customer records retrieved successfully", correlationId: "2f6c2b7b-8b1b-4f2d-9ef2-9c6a2a1b0d6a", data: { customers: [ { sapCustomerNumber: "0001001001", accountGroup: "Z001", companyCode: "1000", salesOrganization: "1000", distributionChannel: "10", division: "00", nameLine1: "Acme Corporation", city: "Seattle", region: "WA", postalCode: "98101", countryCode: "US", emailAddress: "ops@acme.example", deletionFlag: false, centralPostingBlock: false } ], recordCount: 1 } } as Object {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}
